/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-undefined,error -compatibility_version 2501.0.0 -o ../../libSDL2_ttf-2.0.0.2500.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libSDL2_ttf-2.0.0.dylib CMakeFiles/SDL2_ttf.dir/SDL_ttf.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ashinjo/Documents/AndyCodebase/app/Mysticbook/build ../../libSDL2-2.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib
